question: What is the base-10 logarithm of the atomic oxygen erosion yield of the polymer Acrylonitrile butadiene styrene [CycolacTM, Absylux] represented by SMILES [*]C=C(/C=C(\\CC(C#N)C(=C)C([*])=C)c1ccccc1)c1ccccc1, with no coating, composed of 3 stacked thin-film layers, oriented in the ram direction for a mission time of 4.0 years, subjected to a solar exposure of 6300 equivalent sun hours and an atomic oxygen fluence of 8.430e+21 atom/cm^2?
